---
title: Saanich peninsula plant diversity
weight: 1
knit: (function(input, ...) { source(here::here("R/knit_render.R"), local = TRUE)$value(input, ...) })
paneKey: Vascular_BEC
regionField: BEC
obsTableVisible: true
---

## Saanich peninsula plant diversity

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plants <- read.csv("tabular_data/Saanich_Tracheophyta_incomplete-aligned-catalogue_2025-08-26-reduced-labels.csv")
```
Over one thousand vascular plant species are known to occur within the Saanich peninsula, represented
by `r nrow(plants)` occurrence records. This diverse flora spans two biogeoclimatic units.

TODO: Do we want to bother with BEC zones since just two are represented?

```{r, echo = FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("scripts/Vascular_BEC_map_mapbox.R")
speciesMap
```
